subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Render thanks unto God that thou hast become a sign of His bounty and a manifestation of grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان شکر کن خدارا که آیت موهبت شدی ومظهر لطف
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
